title: Lead AI Solutions Architect (AI, Azure, Kubernetes, Opensource)
description:
about company

I am currently working with a well-known telecommunications company in Singapore.

Salary structure: base + bonus. 5 days in office. 2 rounds of interview.


about job (please reach out for more detailed JD)

  • Help in developing AI-driven systems tailored for enterprise use, encompassing data pipeline creation, workflow automation through APIs, and deployment of models in Azure cloud environments.
  • Collaborate with a senior architect to build and integrate essential elements of the AI infrastructure, including environments for model execution, component registries, and interoperability tools.
  • Assist in connecting AI capabilities with enterprise applications through API integrations, utilizing both RESTful interfaces and event-based communication strategies.
  • Take part in building, validating, and refining machine learning pipelines on cloud AI platforms such as Azure ML, AWS SageMaker, Bedrock, or AI Foundry.
  • Assess and identify suitable AI platforms and technologies—such as Azure ML, AI Foundry, Databricks, or open-source frameworks—by aligning their capabilities with organizational objectives and technical requirements.

skills and requirements

  • Bachelor degree in computer science, or a related field
  • Min 5 years of relevant working experience.
  • Experienced in implementing solutions on Microsoft Azure
  • Skilled in designing and architecting AI platforms on Azure, leveraging both Azure’s technology stack and open-source tools
  • Proficient in designing and implementing containerized infrastructure using Kubernetes

To apply online please use the 'apply' function, alternatively you may contact Stella at 96554170 (EA: 94C3609 /R1875382)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
